default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: Greetings, Chief of MBCC. I am Siglinde, Senior Wartime Liaison Officer of DisCorps. For the duration of our united front, you may consider me under your command. Rest assured, I will ensure seamless cooperation between our forces.

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: Thank you for your trust. I will ensure the frontline comms remain flawless.

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: Honor, ideals, life itself... Whatever side you're on, there are things worth defending to your last breath.

default.title: Level Start
default.text: Signal source deployed. Engaging combat mode.

default.title: Victory
default.text: A victory worth celebrating. It seems we make a good team.

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: Tactical error. Fall back immediately!

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: Pulse radiation, engage!

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: To die fighting... is glorious enough...

default.title: Greeting
default.text: Liaison Officer Siglinde, at your service. Just say the word, Chief—I'll even arrange a private call with the enemy's CO for you, if that's what you want.

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: What am I always listening to on my headphones? Oh, just secret orders 'bout FAC... I'm kidding. It's white noise—helps me focus. You're welcome to try it, Chief.

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: Rest assured, my professionalism is unwavering. Even in a Black Ring, I'll maintain secure comms. Not a single intel leak to those Corruptors... Hmm, my humor doesn't land with you, does it?

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: The battlefield is volatile, but not uncontrollable. Deploy resources, refine tactics, anticipate threats... With clear analysis, signals and intelligence will bend the chaos to my will.

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: Many see me as an untrustworthy "spy," but I don't dwell on such misunderstandings. As long as we remain allies, I'll honor my duties faithfully and uphold our mutual interests.

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: You may see this vicious weapon as something dangerous and untamable. But to me... it's the only keepsake my parents left me. A legacy of honor, you could say. Or perhaps... a burden I've no choice but to carry.

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: The FAC's valor on the battlefield is undeniable. They are soldiers equally worthy of respect, and I may have misjudged them in the past. Don't mistake this, my convictions remain unchanged. But I've come to recognize the need for a more objective perspective.

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: After all the time we've spent together—seeing the world through your eyes—I've begun to question everything I once believed. Does a soldier's honor lie in conquest... or in sacrifice? Until I find my answer, Chief... let me walk this path with you. Show me the truths I've yet to see.

default.title: Idle
default.text: To sleep so soundly in my presence... Do you always gamble with your trust like this?

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: How... unorthodox. Is this your idea of "bonding" with subordinates, Chief?

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: I quite understand your wariness. With how intently you've been studying me, I can't help but read into it.

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: Rest assured, I'm more than capable in the field.

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: Mission accomplished. I'm glad to have been of service.

default.title: Level Up
default.text: How kind of you to share so freely, Chief. Your generosity lives up to its reputation.
